form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th on April 2 over 300m at Mandurah behind Cracker Dust beaten 7 lengths (17.58) in a Grade 4/5. Expected to bounce right back. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (16.41) at Cannington in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 2.25 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and four minors. Others rate better this time.
